2605.29715.title: User-Aware Active Knowledge Acquisition for Emotional Support Dialogue
2605.29715.paper_summary: Emotional support plays an important role in dialogue systems, and its success depends on adapting to a user's evolving and implicit needs across multi-turn interactions while leveraging the strong reasoning capacity of large language models. However, since signals about user needs are often weak, indirect, and can only be disambiguated through multi-turn interaction, existing emotional support methods often struggle to acquire and generalize relevant conversational knowledge efficiently. To bridge this gap, we introduce User-Aware Active Knowledge Acquisition (UKA), a gradient-free active dialogue learning framework that explicitly represents uncertainty about user needs and incorporates active learning into both knowledge acquisition and response selection.We propose a Theory-of-Mind uncertainty estimation mechanism that allows the model to prioritize responses, thereby eliciting more informative user feedback. UKA is capable of efficiently exploring user-aligned conversational knowledge during training while maintaining robustness at test time. Experiments across multiple dialogue benchmarks and model architectures demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms strong baselines in dialogue quality and user alignment.
2605.29715.paper_summary_zh: 情感支持在對話系統中扮演著重要角色，其成功依賴於適應用戶在多輪互動中不斷演變的隱性需求，同時利用大型語言模型的強大推理能力。<lb/>然而，由於用戶需求的信號往往是微弱的、間接的，且只能通過多輪互動來消歧，因此現有的情感支持方法常常難以有效獲取和概括相關的對話知識。<lb/>為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了用戶感知主動知識獲取（UKA），這是一個無梯度的主動對話學習框架，明確表示對用戶需求的不確定性，並將主動學習納入知識獲取和回應選擇中。<lb/>我們提出了一種心智理論不確定性估計機制，使模型能夠優先考慮回應，從而引出更具信息量的用戶反饋。<lb/>UKA 能夠在訓練過程中有效探索與用戶對齊的對話知識，同時在測試時保持穩健性。<lb/>在多個對話基準和模型架構上的實驗表明，我們的方法在對話質量和用戶對齊方面始終超越強基線。
2605.29715.author: Mufan Xu et.al.
2605.29715.authors: Mufan Xu, Kehai Chen, Jiahao Hu, Xinchao Xu, Muyun Yang, Tiejun Zhao, Min Zhang
